THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, JERRY DBA CAR PARTS AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
